final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial street portrait photograph set in 1990s Hong Kong.

Style/medium: needs a "复古胶片" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 1990s Hong Kong cinema (Wong Kar-wai's Chungking Express), Japanese film photography (Nobuyoshi Araki's night street work), 35mm Kodak film palette; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include a young woman leaning against a neon sign as the focal subject
Subject: must include a young woman wearing a denim jacket
Scene/backdrop: must include 1990s Hong Kong street at night with neon signage
Lighting/mood: needs a hazy night atmosphere with nostalgic mood — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm direction with film grain texture — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a film grain surface treatment — exact grain level is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
